github._comment_token: Set GITHUB_TOKEN in your shell: export GITHUB_TOKEN=your_fine_grained_token
github._comment_permissions: Fine-grained token with: Contents=read, Issues=read, Pull requests=read

filesystem._comment_path: Set COPILOT_FILESYSTEM_PATH to a specific project directory only. NEVER set to /

_security_notes: NEVER commit mcp.json with real tokens — this file is gitignored
Always use ${env:VAR_NAME} for secrets — never hardcode
Scope filesystem access to specific directories only, never root
Use fine-grained GitHub tokens with minimum required permissions
Commit THIS file (mcp.example.json) as a template — not mcp.json
_setup_instructions: 2. Set environment variables in your shell profile (~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc):
3. Reload VS Code: Command Palette -> Developer: Reload Window
4. Verify MCP tools appear in Copilot Agent Mode
